name: Eldred
description_en: Eldred married into the Crownguard family through his wife, Tianna , the High Marshal of Demacia. During his tenure as leader of the mageseekers, he was responsible for imprisoning Sylas and indoctrinating Wisteria into their ranks. After Sylas escaped from his prison and began his revolution, Eldred ordered Wisteria to apprehend him. Eventually Sylas killed Eldred when his forces assaulted the Great City of Demacia.
description_fr: Eldred s'est marié dans la famille Crownguard par l'intermédiaire de sa femme, Tianna, la grande maréchale de Demacia. Au cours de son mandat en tant que chef des chercheurs de mages, il fut responsable de l'emprisonnement de Sylas et de l'endoctrinement de Wisteria dans leurs rangs. Après que Sylas se soit échappé de sa prison et ait commencé sa révolution, Eldred a ordonné à Wisteria de l'appréhender. Finalement, Sylas tua Eldred lorsque ses forces attaquèrent la Grande Ville de Demacia.
